The Set Up
-Scarcity (X spots Left)
-Urgency (ends in 2 Days)
-Authority (we only take serious people etc.)
Energy/Rapport/Belief
-Testimonials to reinforce belief. Fix all problems with your product before you sell it.
-Know how to get in state (music, dance, etc.)
-Understand the interpersonal objective to be liked & trusted
-What separates the good from the great is consistency & course correction
-Wow them as soon as they walk in the door/get on the phone
-Set the tone energy-wise (control)
-Happy “Day of the week”
Clarify Why They Walked in/Became A Lead
-NEVER let them ask the questions
-What made you do that?
-What’s your main goal?
-What got you interested in this…?
Assign their problem
-Reiterate (so you want XXX)
-You’re not going to be upset with me if I help you do XYZ?
-So you’d be happy if X weeks from now YYY happened?
-Acknowledge their response
Bring the PAIN
-All questions should be targeted to overcome a specific obstacle
-How long have you been trying to get this result?
-How long have you been WANTING to get this result?
-So you’ve been working X hrs/wk for past 18 months and you’ve gained weight?
You’ve lost money? Business has stayed the same?
-What other things have you tried?
-How did those things work out for you? Short term/long term
-Educate on the problem with that solution (yours should solve it)
-What do you think you need or didn’t have? Should be going for a specific answer
here. Usually a combo of knowledge & accountability.
-Reiterate ALL of the things they just told you, and how each of them turned out and ]
how they did not get the result. The goal is to make the incredibly aware of their
failure.
Transition to Pitch
-Well I think given what you just told me about XYZ, I think you're going to like this =
program/course/offer
-Want to hear about how this program is actually going to work for you?
Pitch
-Always offer the amazing guarantee that reverses all risk
-3 main components to being successful and point out the contrast between how
others didn’t satisfy all three or did just a partial job
-Explain how each component helps them reach their goal and restate the BENEFIT
-Make sure they accept each piece of the program and that it makes sense to them
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

The Close
-So that’s pretty much how we have all the amazing success stories we have and
why XX% of people who start this program hit their goal within XX days. Which
means that you would hit your goal by XX date
-Pretty amazing right?
-Ok, so don’t worry, it’s only going to cost as much as your car (humor)
-Just kidding, the investment to (state their goal) is $XXX
-And that’s because we wanted to make it exclusive enough to actually get them to
their goal rather than over promising and under-delivering
-This way, when you invest in the program, we feel confident that we can give you
exactly what you wanted.
-Badass right? Awesome – so are you ready to start (losing weight/making sales) say
a statement that they would feel silly saying no to.
-If yes – awesome what type of card are you planning on using?
Obstacles
-Totally! (acknowledge their right to have a concern and make it seem totally normal,
not like they’re doing anything different than any other sale). What’s your main
concern?
-Need to think about it
-Have to talk to decision maker/partner
-Money (offer payment plans, go into their normal expenses and cut costs, explain
how this will save/make them money over the same period of time)
Acc Coach:
-Hows it going BY NAME
-See that you lost XXlbs this week, awesome job, keep it up.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 2 --
